Hearing On Defendants Rajiv Rai And Krishna Digital Imaging'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons, Vacate Default And Default Judgment.
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant Krishna Rai's Motion to Quash Service of Summons, and Vacate Default and Default Judgment, and defendants Rajiv Rai & Krishna Digital Imaging's Motion to Vacate Default and Default Judgment.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Thomas McConnell, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Angelo Markoulis, who was not present at today's hearing.
S. Robert Diener, Esq. appeared for defendants Rai Rajiv, Krishna Rai and Krishna Digital Imaging, who were not present at today's hearing.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS defendant Krishna Rai's Motion to Quash Service of Summons, and Vacate Default and Default Judgment, and defendants Krishna Rai and Digital Imaging's Motion to Vacate Default and Default Judgment.
Mr. McConnell's request for attorney's fees is DENIED.

Counsel for defendants shall submit a proposed order to the Court no later than December 19, 2008.

MINI MINUTES: This cause was transferred from Department 301 for hearing on defendant Krishan Rai's motion to quash service of summons, vacate default and vacate default judgment.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Thomas McConnell appeared with plaintiff Angelo Markoulis.
S. Robert Diener, Esq. appeared for defendant Krishan Rai, who was not present at today's hearing.

On the Court's own motion, this matter is continued to November 24, 2008 @ 9:00 for a specially set hearing on defendant's motion to quash service of summons, vacate default and vacate default judgment. Furthermore, the Order of Examination, presently scheduled for November 7, 2008, shall be stayed pending resolution of defendant's present motion.

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Thomas S. McConnell, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Angelo Markoulis, who was not present.
Greg Markoulis, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearances by defendants Rajiv Rai, Krishan Rai or Krishna Digital Imaging.
Defaults entered against defendants Rajiv Rai, Krishan Rai and Krishna Digital Imaging on October 31, 2007, December 28, 2007 and October 31, 2007, respectively.
Doe defendants dismissed on February 25, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Angelo Markoulis, and against the Defaulted Defendants: Rajiv Rai, Krishan Rai and Krishna Digital Imaging as follows:

Damages/Principal - $446,474.02.
Interest shall accrue at the legal rate of ten percent (10%) from the date of Entry of Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
